key_dungeons.name: Shattered Keep
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Shattered Keep. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Jade Key from Shattered Keep
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Tunnels
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Lost Tunnels. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Lost Tunnels and find the Gold Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.

key_dungeons.name: Forsaken Catacombs
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Forsaken Catacombs gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Forsaken Catacombs and liberate the Emerald Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.
